error_signature: No binary data exists on item!
title: No binary data for email attachment
symptom: When attempting to send an email with a PDF attachment, the error 'No binary data exists on item!' is displayed.
applies_when: Trying to attach a PDF from a form
not_this_if: Binary data is present in the previous node
The workflow is correctly configured to handle binary data
root_cause: The error occurs when the Create a draft node does not receive the expected binary data from the previous node. This can happen if the data merging process does not correctly pass the binary data or if the node configuration is incorrect.
fix_steps: Check the output of the node before the Create a draft node to ensure it contains binary data.
If using a Merge node, ensure it is set to combine mode to correctly merge the binary data.
Re-test the workflow to see if the error persists.
agent_instruction: Verify the binary data output from the previous node and adjust the Merge node settings if necessary.
